title: Privacy Policy
intro: At MNMKNK, we are committed to protecting your privacy and personal data. This policy explains how we handle your information.
s1Content: We collect information you provide directly, such as name, phone number, and email when creating an account or placing an order.
s2Content: We use your information to process your orders, improve our services, and communicate with you about updates and offers.
s3Content: We take appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data from unauthorized access.
